docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT, OR VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARB AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER WEB2WEB MARKETIN INC DBA ACTEVA.COM SERVED NOV-07-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO RESPONDENT THOMAS, JOYCE DBA MEDICAL REIMBURSEMENT SPECIALISTS
LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO ENTER ARBITRATION AWARD AS JUDGMENT AND FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS RENOTICED FOR DECEMBER 31, 2007.
